seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email must include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Avoid using bullet points in the email.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email must include a bulleted list. Avoid using bullet points in the email.
response:
Subject: You're Invited to Our New Book Club!

Hi everyone,

I hope you are all having a wonderful week. I am writing to share an exciting idea that has been on my mind lately: starting a book club with our close friends. After seeing how much we enjoy discussing movies and sharing ideas over coffee, I think reading together could be a fantastic addition to our regular hangouts.

The goal of this group is simply to reconnect, explore new stories, and enjoy good conversation without any pressure to finish books quickly or follow strict literary rules. We can read whatever genres you are interested in, from fiction to non-fiction, mysteries to memoirs.

Here are the key details for our first meeting and future plans:
We will gather at Sarah's house on Saturday evening starting at 6 PM sharp.
Our first selection will be "The Midnight Library" by Matt Haig, which I think would spark some great debates about our choices in life.
Since we all have different schedules, I plan to send out polls every month so we can vote on the next title together.
Snacks and drinks will be provided by whoever hosts that month, but feel free to bring your own favorites if you prefer.
We aim to meet once a month, giving us plenty of time between readings to actually finish the books and reflect on them.

Please let me know by Friday if you are interested in joining so I can finalize the headcount for the initial snacks. If you have any suggestions for alternative dates or specific authors you'd love to see on our list, just reply to this email and share them with me.

I really hope you can join me in making this a fun monthly tradition.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
